pi_items.source: docker-compose.yml lines 7 and 25 (port 8080 exposed, PUBLIC_URL set to http://localhost:8080); setup_jitsi.sh lines 78, 84, 155 (service configured at http://localhost:8080); task_utils.sh line 4 (default JITSI_BASE_URL); setup_task.sh line 9

privileged_info_summary: Jitsi Meet is configured to run on http://localhost:8080. The task uses Jitsi Meet version stable-9753 (from docker-compose.yml). Jitsi Meet version 9753 includes the virtual background feature, which was released in March 2022 and is accessible through the Settings dialog. The virtual background feature supports both blur and image backgrounds.
